name: Bubble and Squeak
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the potatoes in cold salted water. Bring to boil, cook for 5 minutes. Drain and set aside.
2. Blanch the cabbage in boiling salted water for 3 minutes, then drain and cool in a bowl of cold water. Drain again.
3. Heat the oil and butter together in a large frying pan. Pour off two-thirds into a small bowl. Fry potatoes in remaining fat for 5 minutes until golden and crisp, stirring occasionally. Remove from pan and add some reserved butter and oil. Repeat with cabbage and onions.
4. Return potatoes, cabbage, and onions to the frying pan and scatter over rosemary and seasoning. Make 4 small indentations in the mixture and break an egg into each. Cover and cook for 4-5 minutes until eggs have just set.
